title: FounderOS SOP: AI Employee Collaboration Protocols
content:
# FounderOS Standard Operating Procedures

This guide explains how human operators collaborate with AI agents. Mentions using @Agent trigger context retrievals. All agents participate in active channels like #general.

title: Market Analysis: TAM-SAM-SOM Pitch Deck Draft
content:
# Market Analysis & TAM-SAM-SOM

- TAM: $12B (Global AI Agent tooling and workspace market)
- SAM: $4.5B (SME & startup operational platforms)
- SOM: $250M (Initial developer/creator SaaS customer targets)
